0.description: Tormere protection at Marara was a protection miracle of Rain Oath of Elhelm attributed to Elport the Gale Keeper; Marara took heart from the sign. Elport the Gale Keeper's usual miracle bias is storm.

1.description: Norara victory at Peldun was a victory miracle of Counting Creed of Galdrim attributed to Galstead the Market Keeper; Peldun took heart from the sign. Galstead the Market Keeper's usual miracle bias is omen.

2.description: Quavale revelation at Nordrim was a revelation miracle of Counting Creed of Kelwatch attributed to Lorara the Scale Mother; Nordrim took heart from the sign. Lorara the Scale Mother's usual miracle bias is victory.

3.description: Pelora victory at Junwatch was a victory miracle of Peak Rite of Armere attributed to Ulia the Stone Father; Junwatch took heart from the sign. Ulia the Stone Father's usual miracle bias is storm.

4.description: Sarhelm omen at Riveria was a omen miracle of Night Path of Coreria attributed to Ordrim the Far Seer; Riveria took heart from the sign. Ordrim the Far Seer's usual miracle bias is omen.
